title: Ability to prune container in api V2
body:
Ability to prune container in api V2

Adds the ability to prune containers for v2.
Includes client-side prompt with force flag and filters options to prune.

Signed-off-by: Sujil02 <sushah@redhat.com>

comments.body: Fix the commit message.  I don't know how you pune containers.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5760) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
